title: fsl.lock schema + sweeps
manager: `fsl.lock` — reproducible system builds where every registry member is pinned to its source hash, certificate, and edition, sweepable in CI so a build can't silently drift. This is the supply-chain keystone, specced before the first incident instead of after: the lockfile is what makes "the exact same verified components" a checkable fact, and `verify` sweeps enforce that every locked certificate stays valid over time.
cs: schema (irreversibles #18): members[{name, source_hash, certificate_ref, edition, resolved_path}]; lock-verify in `verify` sweeps; receipts participate ("these receipts must stay valid"); refinement certs flow through upgrades.
